title: File:Mardi_Gras_ship_22-12-2020_back_view.jpg
description: Taken from Hoek van Holland on 22-12-2020, this is Carnival's first LNG-powered cruise ship Mardi Gras making her inaugural visit to Rotterdam for bunkering. Pictured is primarily the back/stern of the ship.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Stern view with "Mardi Gras" and Carnival lettering visible; same Tunestoons 22-12-2020 series
